title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!
